channel.title: Tony's Website :) on agtonybarletta
channel.description: Recent content in Tony's Website :) on agtonybarletta

item.title: 3D printer laser support
item.description: Many 3d printers come with additional power ports that can be used to add new peripherals. Secondary fans, led strips, and enclousure heaters are some examples. I attached a tiny Laser to one of those ports and I transformed my Creality Ender 3 3D printer into a laser engraver. More often than not these lasers come with little magnets that keep the laser attached to the extruder. I design this small laser support secure the laser to the extruder support.

item.title: Bike
item.description: Shot with: Canon EOS 1200D Canon EF-S 18-55mm f/3.5-5.6 IS II Parameters: ISO 800 50mm f/5.6 1/6 Edited with: RawTherapee Downloads: parameters.txt [original]({{ print $pathURL “hobbies/photos/” .Page.Params.imageName “/” .Page.Params.imageName “-original.CR2” }})

item.title: Cola bottle cap
item.description: This bottle cap for Coca-Cola glass bottles makes them reusable and reduces waste. It also comes with a paracord to decrease the chances of losing the cap. Material Used: TPU. STL FCStd GLTF

item.title: iPhone IBM case
item.description: This is a iphone SE case branded IBM. I design it for my company phone back when I used to work for IBM. FCStd Case Material black TPU: case STL case GLTF Logo Material white PLA: logo STL logo GLTF Credit to Leo10698 for the iPhone SE case iphone se 2020 / 8 / 7 flexible case by Leo10698 on Thingiverse: https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:4766166

item.title: Pizzeria
item.description: Shot with: Canon EOS 1200D Canon EF-S 18-55mm f/3.5-5.6 IS II Parameters: ISO 3200 50mm f/5.6 1/30 Edited with: Darktable Downloads: parameters.txt

item.title: Tree pt2
